title: Iran oil revenue soars as it's the only exporter out of Hormuz
full_text: From March 1 to 23, Iran exported about 1.6 million barrels a day on average, close to prewar levels, according to TankerTrackers.com. Even before the war started on Feb. 28, the country’s shipments were unusually high, with February loadings at the highest level since around July 2018, Kpler data show.
